# Fracture Type Dashboard (균열 유형별 현황)

**Source:** Auto-generated by Dataview from atom YAML frontmatter
**Layer:** All

## Fracture Subtype Summary (균열 하위유형 요약)

```dataview
TABLE length(rows) AS "건수",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.verdict = "CORROBORATED")) AS "입증"
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE fracture-type != null
GROUP BY fracture-type
SORT length(rows) DESC
```

## F-SC: Self-Contradiction (자기모순) — Strongest

```dataview
TABLE layer, verdict, strength
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE fracture-type = "F-SC"
SORT layer ASC
```

## F-CE: Counter-Evidence (반증)

```dataview
TABLE layer, verdict, strength
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE fracture-type = "F-CE"
SORT layer ASC
```

## F-MS: Manipulation Signal (조작 징후)

```dataview
TABLE layer, verdict, strength
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE fracture-type = "F-MS"
SORT layer ASC
```

## F-AA: Argument from Absence (부재 논증)

```dataview
TABLE layer, verdict, strength
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE fracture-type = "F-AA"
SORT layer ASC
```

## F-SE: Selective Enforcement (선별 적용)

```dataview
TABLE layer, verdict, strength
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE fracture-type = "F-SE"
SORT layer ASC
```

## Key Takeaways

- F-SC (self-contradiction) is the strongest evidence type — provable from single document
- F-MS (manipulation signal) is most frequent — temporal/pattern anomalies
- Use this dashboard to identify which fracture types need additional evidence
